LanguageData.PGG_ThingSummoningFailed: The ritual failed to summon any {0}.
LanguageData.PGG_ThingSummoningFailed_Placement: The ritual succeeded, but the summoned items could not be placed!
LanguageData.PGG_SummoningBacklashSuffered: {PAWN_nameDef} suffered psychic backlash from the summoning ritual!
LanguageData.PGG_HellboarCombustion: {0} has spontaneously ignited from the Hellboar Strain!
